service_description: API for comparing npm package download trends, registry metadata, and GitHub stats. Powers npmtrends.com. Use this to compare package popularity, track download growth, and evaluate packages before adopting them.

tools.name: get_package_info
tools.description: Get npm registry metadata for a package: description, latest version, homepage, repository URL, and release timeline. Use this to understand what a package does and when it was last updated.

tools.name: get_weekly_downloads
tools.description: Get the total download count for an npm package over the last 7 days. Use this for a quick snapshot of current popularity.

tools.name: get_download_trends
tools.description: Get daily download counts for one or more npm packages over a date range. For a single package returns {start, end, package, downloads[{day, downloads}]}. For multiple comma-separated packages returns an object keyed by package name. Use this to compare popularity trends or see growth over time.

parameters.name: packages
parameters.description: One package name or a comma-separated list for comparison (e.g., 'react' or 'react,vue,svelte'). No spaces.

parameters.name: date_range
parameters.description: Date range in YYYY-MM-DD:YYYY-MM-DD format (e.g., '2025-01-01:2026-01-01'). Use a full year for meaningful trend data.

tools.name: get_github_stats
tools.description: Get GitHub repository stats for an npm package: star count, fork count, and open issue count. Use this alongside download trends to assess community health and momentum.

parameters.name: owner
parameters.description: The GitHub repository owner (e.g., 'facebook' for facebook/react).

parameters.name: repo
parameters.description: The GitHub repository name (e.g., 'react' for facebook/react).
